overloaded_lessons.title: Extrusion Process: Screw Design, Flow Mechanics and Die Geometry
overloaded_lessons.issue: Combines screw channel fluid mechanics, die pressure drop, and extrudate die swell into single lesson
overloaded_lessons.resolution: Boundaries demarcated. New lesson 'EXP-PROC-01: Extrusion Die Swell Mechanics' added to isolate viscoelastic exit flow.

overloaded_lessons.title: Vulcanization of Rubber: Chemistry, Systems & Industrial Practice
overloaded_lessons.issue: Combines sulfur vulcanization chemistry with MDR experimental cure curves and TPE physics
overloaded_lessons.resolution: Boundaries demarcated. New lessons 'EXP-RUBB-01: MDR Cure Curve Analysis' and 'EXP-RUBB-02: Thermoplastic Elastomers' added to isolate kinetics.

overloaded_lessons.title: Draft Angles & Volumetric Shrinkage Allowance in Injection Mould Design
overloaded_lessons.issue: Combines component design rules of thumb with runner balancing and tool mechanical kinematics
overloaded_lessons.resolution: Boundaries demarcated. New lessons 'EXP-MOLD-01: Multi-Cavity Runner Balancing' and 'EXP-MOLD-03: Undercut Release Mechanics' added.

boundary_clarifications.rule: Processing lessons focus on polymer fluid mechanics, shear rate, and machine parameters. Mould Design lessons focus on steel tooling geometry, runner sizing, cooling channels, and actuation kinematics.

Testing lessons cover standardized laboratory protocols (ASTM/ISO) for thermal (DSC), mechanical (DMA), and chemical (GC-MS) characterization. Rheology lessons cover non-Newtonian flow equations, melt elasticity, and constitutive modeling.

boundary_clarifications.domain: Recycling Technology vs Life Cycle Assessment
boundary_clarifications.rule: Recycling covers physical/chemical process engineering (wash lines, super-cleaning, pyrolysis). LCA covers ISO 14040/44 inventory modeling, Scope 1/2/3 carbon footprinting, and EPD declarations.
